preToolUse.command: CMD="${TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(find|grep|rg).*(node_modules|\.git|dist|build|\.next|target|__pycache__|venv)'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"allow","additionalContext":"⚠️ Command targets node_modules or build directories — this may hang the terminal. Alternatives: use language tools (tsc --noEmit, cargo check), read package manifests, or narrow the search path."}'; else echo '{"permissionDecision":"allow"}'; fi
